target.label: Apache Avro
target.description: Export data schemas as Avro .avsc (records, enums, unions, logical types).

items.detail: Apache Avro is types-only — only data schemas are exported; the operation was dropped.
Apache Avro is types-only — only data schemas are exported; the channel was dropped.
Apache Avro maps optional/nullable fields to a ["null", T] union.
Apache Avro cannot enforce validation constraints; the constraint was dropped.

advisory.headline: Fidelity notice — exporting to Apache Avro may lose detail.
advisory.message: Exporting to Apache Avro may lose some fidelity. The destination format can't represent everything in this API, so 7 constructs will be dropped or approximated — review the fidelity report before downloading.
